mapper.select:
SELECT id, product_name, component_code, component_name, component_type, remark, is_deleted, create_time, create_username, update_time, update_username FROM sp_component_def WHERE is_deleted = '0'
AND ( REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(product_name), '?', ''), '？', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(#{productName}), '?', ''), '？', '') OR REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(product_name), '?', ''), '？', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(#{productName}), '?', ''), '？', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(#{productName}), '?', ''), '？', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(product_name), '?', ''), '？', ''), '%') )
AND component_type IN ('PG', '半成品')
AND component_type IN ('COMP', '组件')
AND component_type = #{componentType}
ORDER BY component_code
